text: Dr. Sangita Mishra Specialization: Dermatologist Consultation Fee: Experience: 11 Years Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha Conditions Treated Acne Eczema Psoriasis Hair Loss Skin Allergy Fungal Infection Appointment Booking Book online, phone or reception. Bring ID and reports. Treatment Information Diagnosis, consultation, treatment planning, lifestyle advice, and follow-up care. FAQs Fee: Reschedule: Yes Walk-ins: Subject to availability BSKY/Ayushman Bharat: Yes Escalation Severe skin conditions require emergency care. Other issues are handled by human support.
